title: Flea Treatment in Inwood, Manhattan | $350 – $650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment in Inwood, Manhattan starting at $350. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Inwood home or apartment? Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Inwood, from the historic buildings near Inwood Hill Park to the pre-war apartments along Dyckman Street. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages, ensuring your family and pets can live comfortably again.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Upper Manhattan, we understand the unique pest challenges Inwood residents face in everything from classic walk-ups to garden apartments. Our licensed exterminators provide thorough inspections, customized treatment plans, and follow-up services to guarantee complete flea elimination with pricing transparent from $350 to $650 depending on your property size.
localContext: Inwood's abundant green spaces, including Inwood Hill Park and Fort Tryon Park, make it a wonderful place to live but can also increase the risk of pets bringing fleas indoors. The neighborhood's mix of pre-war buildings and newer developments each present unique treatment considerations, which our team handles with expertise and care.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide flea treatment service in Inwood?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day flea treatment services throughout Inwood, Manhattan. Emergency appointments are available for severe infestations. Call us before noon for potential same-day service to your Inwood home or apartment.

faqs.question: What does the $350 – $650 flea treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment includes a thorough inspection, targeted application of EPA-approved products to all affected areas, treatment of cracks and crevices where fleas hide, and a follow-up visit if needed. The price varies based on your property size, infestation severity, and number of rooms requiring treatment.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Inwood apartment before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation helps maximize treatment effectiveness. We recommend vacuuming all carpets and furniture, washing pet bedding in hot water, and temporarily relocating pets during treatment. We'll provide a detailed preparation checklist when you schedule your appointment to ensure the best results.

faqs.question: Are your flea treatments safe for pets and children in my Inwood home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-registered products that are highly effective against fleas but safe for your family and pets when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away during application and for 2-4 hours afterward until surfaces dry. All products meet strict safety standards for residential use.
